title: Places, People, and Plans Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Travelling to new places for fun or to learn about them.
choices: tourism
airport
railroad
rounds.answer: tourism
rounds.explanation: tourism: Travelling to new places for fun or to learn about them.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A big shopping centre with many stores under one roof.
choices: tourism
airport
mall
rounds.answer: mall
rounds.explanation: mall: A big shopping centre with many stores under one roof.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A machine that carries people up and down between floors.
choices: airport
elevator
tourism
rounds.answer: elevator
rounds.explanation: elevator: A machine that carries people up and down between floors.

games.title: Sentence Puzzle

We bought new shoes at the mall.
